Petition For Order Removing Co-Trustee, Requiring An Accounting From Co-Trustee, Ordering The Return Funds To The Trust By Co-Trustee, Ect.
Off Calendar Jun-28-2010 Continued To Sep-13-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marlene Getchell for Claudia Kim (Co-Trustee/Respondent). John Mangini for Lori Kim (Petitioner/Co-Trustee).

The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. Mediation is to be completed by August 25, 2010 and the Parties are to inform the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by September 8, 2010 (order for the same signed in open Court). The matter was continued to September 13, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
